free_text: Joint combined evaluation of total (g,xn) and  (g,sn)
reactions cross sections for 127I  was  carried  out
based  on  the  results of investigation of those in
reasons of data  disagreements  were  analyzed,  the
values of normalization factors for putting all data
in consistency to  each  other  were  obtained.
Data were compiled  at  Russia  MSU  SINP
The method   analogue   to  that  used  for  combined
analysis of  photoneutron  reaction  cross  sections
obtained using beams of quasimonoenergerical photons
at Saclay (France) and  Livermore  (USA)  was  used.
